title: The EU ETS needs surgery, not makeup [Promoted Content]
summary_full: The current design of the EU ETS makes it unable to face the upcoming challenges of ensuring energy security, price affordability, and Europe’s competitiveness. Cosmetic changes will not work anymore; it needs major changes.
